# Cursor Real CLI Gate

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

Cursor real CLI evidence is opt-in and is only PASS when the provider roundtrip creates the expected daemon-selected workdir artifact.

- The adapter passes `--workspace <cwd>` and `--trust` for the daemon-selected workdir.
- The daemon adapter must not default to Cursor `--yolo`.
- The real CLI integration gate requires `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`, local Cursor auth, `ResultCompleted`, and artifact verification.
